mapper.select: SELECT ssrp.id, ssrp.superassist_id, ssrp.resource_id, ssrp.resource_type, ssrp.create_time, ssrp.privilege_type FROM suas_superassist_resource_privilege ssrp WHERE ssrp.superassist_id = #{assistantId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY ssrp.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.superassist_id, p.resource_id, p.resource_type, p.create_time, p.privilege_type, r.resource_name, r.resource_desc, r.resource_biz_type FROM suas_superassist_resource_privilege p LEFT JOIN ss_resource r ON p.resource_id = r.resource_id WHERE p.superassist_id = #{assistantId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO suas_superassist_resource_privilege ( id, superassist_id, resource_id, resource_type, create_time, privilege_type ) VALUES
( #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.superassistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.resourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.resourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.privilegeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
